leveling_guide.scope: Executes well-scoped tasks with close guidance; learning the craft.
Owns small features with some guidance; growing independence.
Owns features independently within a team
Owns complex projects, mentors others, leads design reviews
Drives org-wide technical strategy and cross-team initiatives
Sets multi-year technical direction; influence across the company.
Leads a small team; coaches and delivers through others.
Manages a team and its roadmap; owns delivery and growth of reports.
Manages managers or a large team; owns a domain's execution.
Directs a function or large org; owns strategy and outcomes.
Executive; owns a major business area and its results.

tracks.description: Deepens craft and technical scope without managing people.
Leads people and teams; partners with IC leaders on strategy.

inclusive_language_rules: list must-haves separately from nice-to-haves to widen the funnel
avoid 'native English speaker'; use 'fluent written and verbal English'
avoid 'recent graduate' unless role is entry-level
include the pay range where required by law
avoid physical requirements unless essential and stated as such
lead with impact and mission, not perks
cap years-of-experience at the floor, never a ceiling

leveling_competencies.description: Size and reach of problems owned, from task to org-wide.
Depth and quality of domain/technical skill for the level.
Degree of guidance required, from close direction to self-directed.
Influence on peers, teams, and direction.
Reliability of delivery and handling of ambiguity and risk.

comp_philosophy.pay_transparency: Ranges posted where required by CO, CA, NY, WA, IL and EU pay-transparency rules.
